subject: (no subject)
body:
the more time you have to announce the better. Ive set up you and peter to meet in davos with darling. it would be better afterwards to announce. I would go slowly, this can set the stage for lots to come. Obama really wants a fight. its crzy. "They took bailout money and then ......" the problems are all inherited , not of his doing, he reached out a hand to help and was taken advantage of -, typical but problematic.

--
